/indexers/{indexer_name}.description: Indexer expoint for the specified indexer

query_params.audio: filter by audio languages (comma separated, e.g. por,eng,brazilian)
query_params.filter_results: if results with similarity equals to zero should be filtered (true/false)
query_params.imdb: filter by imdb ID (e.g. tt1234567) - this ONLY FILTERTS results, for searching by IMDB ID use the "q" parameter
query_params.limit: maximum number of results to return
query_params.sortBy: sort by field (title, original_title, year, date, seed_count, leech_count, size, similarity)
query_params.sortDirection: sort direction (asc or desc, default: desc)

/indexers/manual.description: Add a manual torrent entry to the indexer for 12 hours

/search.description: Search for cached torrents across all indexers

query_params.limit: maximum number of results to return (default: 10)

/ui/.description: Show the unified search UI (only work if Meilisearch is enabled)
